allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial release: Website Migration Analyzer Chrome Extension

Features:
- Complete asset discovery (HTML, CSS, JS, images, fonts)
- Next.js SSR data extraction from __NEXT_DATA__
- GraphQL endpoint and query discovery
- Real-time network request monitoring with page reload triggers
- Framework detection (React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, Nuxt.js)
- Third-party service analysis and categorization
- Advanced DevTools panel for network monitoring
- Comprehensive JSON export with migration context

Technical highlights:
- Manifest V3 Chrome extension
- Background service worker for network capture
- Content script with SSR data parsing
- Multi-signal framework detection
- Entity relationship analysis from pageProps
- Real-time debugging tools

Built for developers migrating websites to modern frameworks.
EOF
)")
